_revisionNote: Per spec Revision 2, queue-bucket counts (english/french/ai/ai_overflow) are sourced from raw_queue_stats, NOT from logical_calls aggregation. Per Revision 2.1 (post-code-review), inclusion is strict DNIS-only — queue-touch is no longer an inclusion path. For this 25-segment fixture the count is unchanged at 17 (no queue-only-no-DNIS calls present), but the rule is now narrower. For per-period queue bucket expected values, see queue-stats-samples.json + expected-snapshot.json.
_filterNote: Stage 4 WHERE clause keeps only logical_calls where touched_dnis = true. Of the 25 distinct from_call_ids in this fixture, 17 have at least one segment whose normalized to.id matches the tracked DNIS. The other 8 are excluded — they're internal calls captured incidentally in the sample.
_totalIncomingNote: Equals count of logical_calls.touched_dnis = true. For this fixture's 25-segment subset (NOT a full-day count). The dashboard's daily total_incoming for 2026-04-16 would be much higher.
computedBy: scripts/breakdown-cdr-samples.mjs (under Revision 2 build-logical-calls SQL). Operator should spot-check the 17/8 inclusion split before relying on the canary.
